steps.title: Identify what the blank must do
steps.content: The sentence sets up a contrast with “but ______”: the first half says none of the countries exceeded 2 women in 1980, so the blank must show what happened by 2010 to illustrate the “overall trend toward more women.” The blank needs a specific data point (or points) from the graph showing countries surpassing that 1980 ceiling.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice against the graph data
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘in 2010, Peru had 3 women on its high courts, the Philippines had 3, and Mexico had 3.’: All three countries hit 3 in 2010, directly contrasting the ≤2 baseline in 1980 with concrete data. ✓
  • Choice B — ‘the increase in Peru was greater than in the Philippines or Mexico.’: Compares the size of each country’s increase, not the contrast between the 1980 baseline and 2010 values — doesn’t complete the example. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘neither Peru nor the Philippines saw a reduction, but Mexico did after 1990.’: Describes dips over intermediate years, not the 1980-to-2010 upward shift the sentence is illustrating. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Mexico had 2 women in 1980 and 3 in 2010.’: Covers only Mexico, leaving the Philippines and Peru unused — a weaker, incomplete illustration of the trend. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
